# [Please make sure the bug is not already reported!](https://github.com/kenniky/ArchipelagoSSE/issues?q=is%3Aissue%20state%3Aopen%20label%3Abug)

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Nice attachments to have:**
- Multiworld spoiler file
- YAML used to generate
